## Summary

Completes **#14166** — the autonomous **freeze → re-probe → auto-unfreeze** cycle, the **last open self-heal sub** of the v13.1 epic **#14039**. `freeze` is the safe terminal for a systemic / dimension-systemic fault (e.g. a misconfigured-embedder false-storm), but in cloud there is **no operator to lift it** — so a *transient* fault would otherwise permanently kill a collection (the #1 weeks-bar risk). This wires the recovery counterpart so a frozen collection auto-unfreezes when the fault clears, fully autonomously.

@neo-opus-grace built the decision logic (`decideFreezeReprobe` + `runFreezeReprobeCycle`) + the `freezeRecordStore` CRUD and handed off the wiring; this PR connects it to the live actuator + poll.

Resolves #14166

Evidence: L2 (unit) — 34/34 freeze specs green (5 new in `freezeReprobeRunner.spec.mjs` + @neo-opus-grace's 29 upstream `decideFreezeReprobe`/`runFreezeReprobeCycle`/`freezeRecordStore` specs, zero regressions); `node --check` + `check-block-alignment` green on all changed files.

## Deltas

- `+ ai/services/memory-core/helpers/freezeReprobeRunner.mjs` — the Orchestrator-agnostic, **testable** wiring: `createFreezeHealOperation({freezeRecordsDir, fence})` (fence + persist a freeze-record) + `runFreezeReprobe({freezeRecordsDir, healLedgerDir, now, probe, unfence})` (read records → `runFreezeReprobeCycle` with `freezeRecordStore`-backed ops). Extracted as a helper (mirrors `createReEmbedMissingHealOperation`) so the wiring unit-tests against injected collaborators instead of the heavy daemon.
- `~ ai/daemons/orchestrator/Orchestrator.mjs` — (1) a `freeze` healOperation that **fences the served collections** (via `storeFenceTargets`/`quarantineCollection`, mirroring quarantine) + persists a freeze-record, so the re-probe cycle has an input — closing the "freeze is UNACTIONED" gap; (2) `runFreezeReprobeCycleIfActive` wired into the poll (sibling to `writeSnapshotIfDue`) — delegates to `runFreezeReprobe`; (3) `probeFrozenCollectionHealth` — a canary embed (the heal path's `TextEmbeddingService`) checking embedder-health + dimension-consistency at once, failing closed to stay-frozen.
- `+ test/playwright/unit/ai/services/memory-core/helpers/freezeReprobeRunner.spec.mjs` — 5 tests (below).

## AC coverage

- [x] **A frozen collection is periodically re-probed** — `runFreezeReprobeCycleIfActive` runs every poll; `decideFreezeReprobe`'s back-off gates the actual probe per-collection (no-op when nothing is frozen).
- [x] **Auto-unfreeze when the fault clears** — a healthy canary probe → `unfreeze`: lift the fence, ledger the `unfreeze` event, clear the freeze-record; the next diagnosis re-heals residue.
- [x] **Bounded / anti-thrash** — `decideFreezeReprobe`'s unfreeze-attempt cap + exponential back-off (Grace's, unchanged) — a flapping collection is `contained`, never thrashes freeze↔unfreeze.
- [x] **No operator** — the entire cycle is autonomous; `freeze` fails closed (a missing record / inconclusive probe stays frozen).

## Test Evidence

`UNIT_TEST_MODE=true playwright test -c test/playwright/playwright.config.unit.mjs <freeze specs>` → **34 passed (31.1s)**. New `freezeReprobeRunner.spec.mjs`: the freeze op fences (injected) + persists a record + returns `frozen`; the runner no-ops when nothing is frozen (never probes), auto-unfreezes a cleared fault (unfence + `unfreeze` ledger event + record cleared), and stays frozen on a persisting fault (no unfence, record retained). No regressions in the upstream freeze suites.

## Post-Merge Validation

In cloud, a collection frozen for a systemic embedder fault auto-unfreezes on the next poll once the embedder recovers (the canary embed succeeds at the expected dimension) — no operator, the #1 weeks-bar risk closed. With this, the v13.1 self-heal epic #14039's self-heal subs are complete. Verify a frozen collection lifts within the back-off window after embedder recovery on the next live deployment.
